deepseek.summary: Technical Report👁️ We present a preview version of **DeepSeek-V4** series, including two strong Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) language models — **DeepSeek-V4-Pro** with 1.6T parameters (49B activated) and **DeepSeek-V4-Flash** with 284B parameters (13B activated) — both supporting a context length of **one million tokens**. DeepSeek-V4 series incorporate several key upgrades in architecture and optimization: 1. **Hybrid Attention Architecture:** We design a hybrid attention mechanism combining Compressed Sparse Attention (CSA) and Heavily Compressed Attention (HCA) to dramatically improve long-context efficiency. links.title: microsoft/skala-1.1

primary_link.title: microsoft/skala-1.1

other.summary: In pursuit of the universal functional for density functional theory (DFT), the OneDFT team from Microsoft Research AI for Science has developed the Skala-1.1 exchange-correlation functional, as introduced in Accurate and scalable exchange-correlation with deep learning, Luise et al. 2025. This approach departs from the traditional route of incorporating increasingly expensive hand-designed non-local features from Jacob\'s ladder into functional forms to improve their accuracy. Instead, we employ a deep learning approach with a scalable neural network that uses only inexpensive input features to learn the necessary non-local representations.

primary_link.title: Nemobot Games: Crafting Strategic AI Gaming Agents for Interactive Learning with Large Language Models

papers.summary: This paper introduces a new paradigm for AI game programming, leveraging large language models (LLMs) to extend and operationalize Claude Shannon's taxonomy of game-playing machines. Central to this paradigm is Nemobot, an interactive agentic engineering environment that enables users to create, customize, and deploy LLM-powered game agents while actively engaging with AI-driven strategies. The LLM-based chatbot, integrated within Nemobot, demonstrates its capabilities across four distinct class

primary_link.title: AEL: Agent Evolving Learning for Open-Ended Environments

papers.summary: LLM agents increasingly operate in open-ended environments spanning hundreds of sequential episodes, yet they remain largely stateless: each task is solved from scratch without converting past experience into better future behavior. The central obstacle is not \emph{what} to remember but \emph{how to use} what has been remembered, including which retrieval policy to apply, how to interpret prior outcomes, and when the current strategy itself must change. primary_link.title: Language as a Latent Variable for Reasoning Optimization

papers.summary: As LLMs reduce English-centric bias, a surprising trend emerges: non-English responses sometimes outperform English on reasoning tasks. We hypothesize that language functions as a latent variable that structurally modulates the model's internal inference pathways, rather than merely serving as an output medium. primary_link.title: Transient Turn Injection: Exposing Stateless Multi-Turn Vulnerabilities in Large Language Models

papers.summary: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly integrated into sensitive workflows, raising the stakes for adversarial robustness and safety. This paper introduces Transient Turn Injection(TTI), a new multi-turn attack technique that systematically exploits stateless moderation by distributing adversarial intent across isolated interactions. papers.summary_zh: 大型語言模型（LLMs）日益整合到敏感工作流程中，提高了對抗性韌性（adversarial robustness）和安全性（safety）的風險。本文介紹了 Transient Turn Injection (TTI)，一種新的多回合攻擊技術，它通過在獨立互動（isolated interactions）中分佈對抗意圖（adversarial intent），系統地利用無狀態內容審核（stateless moderation）。TTI 利用由大型語言模型驅動的自動化攻擊者代理（automated attacker agents），迭代測試並規避商業和開源模型中的策略執行（policy enforcement）。

links.title: Supervised Learning Has a Necessary Geometric Blind Spot: Theory, Consequences, and Minimal Repair

primary_link.title: Supervised Learning Has a Necessary Geometric Blind Spot: Theory, Consequences, and Minimal Repair

papers.summary: We prove that empirical risk minimisation (ERM) imposes a necessary geometric constraint on learned representations: any encoder that minimises supervised loss must retain non-zero Jacobian sensitivity in directions that are label-correlated in training data but nuisance at test time. This is not a contingent failure of current methods; it is a mathematical consequence of the supervised objective itself. We call this the geometric blind spot of supervised learning (Theorem 1), and show it holds
papers.summary_zh: 我們證明了 empirical risk minimisation (ERM) 對於學習到的表徵施加了一個必要的幾何約束：任何最小化監督式損失的編碼器（encoder）都必須在訓練資料中與標籤相關但在測試時為干擾方向上保留非零的 Jacobian 敏感度。這並非當前方法的偶然失敗；它是監督式目標本身的一個數學結果。我們將此稱為監督式學習的幾何盲點 (Theorem 1)，並展示其成立。

papers.title: Alignment has a Fantasia Problem

papers.summary_zh: 科學工作流程系統自動化執行——排程、容錯、資源管理——但未能自動化其之前的語義轉換。科學家仍然手動將研究問題轉換為工作流程規範，這是一項需要領域知識和基礎設施專業知識的任務。我們提出了一種 agentic 架構，透過三個層次彌補了這個鴻溝：一個 LLM 將自然語言解釋為結構化意圖（語義層）；經過驗證的生成器產生可重現的。

papers.summary: Learned Sparse IR models, such as SPLADE, offer an excellent efficiency-effectiveness tradeoff. papers.summary_zh: 學習到的稀疏 IR 模型，例如 SPLADE，提供了卓越的效率-效益權衡。然而，它們依賴於底層的 backbone vocabulary，這可能會阻礙性能（多義性和同義性），並對 multi-lingual 和 multi-modal 的使用構成挑戰。為了解決這一限制，我們建議用透過 Sparse Auto-Encoders (SAE) 學習到的語義概念的 latent space 來取代 backbone vocabulary。在本文中，我們研究了這兩個概念的兼容性。

papers.summary: Standard reinforcement learning (RL) optimizes policies for reward but imposes few constraints on how decisions evolve over time. papers.summary: Test-time adaptation (TTA) has emerged as a promising paradigm for vision-language models (VLMs) to bridge the distribution gap between pre-training and test data. papers.summary_zh: 測試時適應 (Test-Time Adaptation, TTA) 已成為視覺語言模型 (Vision-Language Models, VLMs) 彌合預訓練與測試數據之間分佈差距的一個有前景的範式。最近的工作主要集中在無反向傳播 (backpropagation-free) 的 TTA 方法上，這些方法依賴於基於快取 (cache-based) 的設計，但這些方法引入了兩個主要限制。首先，隨著快取隨著類別數量增加而增長，推理延遲 (inference latency) 也會增加，導致大規模設置中的低效率。其次，當快取包含不足時會出現性能不佳。

radar.summary_zh: 當前的「告知與同意」範式已經失效：同意對話往往具有操縱性，並且使用者無法實際閱讀或理解每一個隱私政策。儘管近期基於 LLM 的工具賦予了尋求主動控制的使用者權力，但許多時間或動機有限的使用者更喜歡完全自動化。然而，完全自主的解決方案存在產生 hallucinations 和不透明決策的風險，從而損害信任。我提出了一個中間方案——一個 Privacy Guardian Agent，它利用使用者個人檔案自動處理例行的同意選擇。
